function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "suppress", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -1.8, "adjustment_reasons": ["geofence_exit from guard source with background:true flag — likely pocket dial / benign movement", "n=0 hand-set prior carries no empirical weight — free to adjust", "Board load at 20 items — flood conditions; rule R-004 directs suppress E0-E1"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.08, "what_would_change_my_mind": "Confirmation from the guard that they were on patrol near the geofence boundary, or a second correlated sensor event indicating actual perimeter breach."}
